mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piisteptablewait (jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, type, db_w, owner_w, table_name_w) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db_w, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner_w, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name_w, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piisteptablewait where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from cotdl.tbl_piisteptablewait where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid}
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piisteptablewait select jobid, TO_NUMBER(version)+1, stepid, db, owner, table_name, type, db_w, owner_w, table_name_w from cotdl.tbl_piisteptablewait where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
